mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO EVS_ITEM_PARAM ( SEQ, RESUME_SEQ, ITEM_CODE, EVS_GROUP, EVS_OCC_GROUP, REMARK, ITEM_SCORE, ACTIVITY, ORDERNO, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, CREATE_DATE ) VALUES ( #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{resumeSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{itemCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{evsGroup, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{evsOccGroup, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{itemScore, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NULL,
1, 200, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE EVS_ITEM_PARAM SET ITEM_CODE = #{itemCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EVS_GROUP = #{evsGroup, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EVS_OCC_GROUP = #{evsOccGroup, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REMARK = #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ITEM_SCORE = #{itemScore, jdbcType=VARCHAR} NULL , UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE SEQ = #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
UPDATE EVS_ITEM_PARAM SET ACTIVITY = 2, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE SEQ = #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
